resolution_notes: Root cause: Metric definition confusion. Granted missing permissions and refreshed cached aggregates.
suggested_action: Review KB articles and escalate if needed.

description: Login redirects loop back to IdP; MFA prompt never completes. Observed in Production. Happening since last release.
steps_taken: Reviewed role mappings; Checked IdP metadata
resolution_notes: Root cause: MFA policy mismatch. Adjusted MFA policy alignment and validated successful login. Performed post-incident review and added monitoring alert.
suggested_action: Reset MFA and verify IdP logs.

description: Modal dialog overlaps footer on Chrome 121; can't click 'Save'. Only affects a subset of users. Happening since last release. Reproducible with standard test account.
steps_taken: Tried hard refresh; Captured console errors
resolution_notes: Root cause: Browser-specific rendering. Fixed regression and added test coverage for the workflow.
suggested_action: Check logs for stack traces and known regressions.
